title: 皐月賞の後に・プリテンディング

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin comes away from the Satsuki Sho
victorious. Her fierce competitive spirit simply
proves to be too much.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If Biwa Hayahide can fill the gaps in her
calculations, she can win. But no matter what
solution she thinks up, premonitions of defeat
plague her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide is shaken. Beside her, Winning
Ticket stays strong and boldly declares her
intention to win the Japanese Derby no matter
what.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Can we rebuild Biwa Hayahide's winning equation
in time for the Derby, where the three of them
will meet once more?
